content.description:
Automatically indexes symbols in code items when they are created or updated. Stores symbol definitions in `content._symbols` for use with `?symbol=` URL parameters.

## How It Works

1. Watches `item:created` and `item:updated` events for code items
2. Parses the code with Acorn to extract symbol definitions
3. Stores symbols in `item.content._symbols`
4. Skips re-save if symbols haven't changed

## See Also

- [symbol-extractor-lib](item://ac0ac0ac-0003-0000-0000-000000000000) — The extraction logic
- [concept:event-system](item://c0c0c0c0-0006-0000-0000-000000000000) — How watches work
